description_long: This object is a classic ring-shaped donut with a light golden-brown baked exterior and a thick layer of pastel pink icing covering the top half. The icing is generously sprinkled with small, colorful candy sprinkles in shades of green, blue, and red, adding a festive touch. The donut has a soft, slightly uneven surface, typical of yeast-raised pastries, and a visible central hole. It is shown next to a round, white ceramic plate with a thin gold rim, which is empty. The donut appears fluffy and fresh, with a slightly matte finish on the dough and a glossy sheen on the icing. A few sprinkles have fallen onto the surface near the donut, enhancing the sense of realism.
description: A pink-iced, sprinkle-topped donut with a soft, golden-brown base, shown beside a white plate with a gold rim. The donut looks fluffy and fresh, with colorful sprinkles scattered on and around it.
description_view_0: The donut is fully visible with its pink icing and colorful sprinkles, placed in front of an empty white plate with a gold rim.
description_view_1: The donut is partially obscured by the plate, showing more of its side and the thickness of the icing.
description_view_2: The plate dominates the view, with the donut mostly behind it, only the top and a bit of the side are visible.
description_view_3: The donut is again fully visible, with the plate positioned behind it, highlighting the donut's surface details and fallen sprinkles.
attribute_icing_type: Pink sugar glaze with a glossy, smooth texture and slight thickness.
attribute_placement_location: next to a white plate with a gold rim
